text:
Created attachment 255585
www/py-sherlock.patch

Sherlock is a powerful tool designed to hunt down social media accounts by
username across 400+ social networks. It allows users to search for one or
multiple usernames, storing the results in individual text files.

WWW:    https://github.com/sherlock-project/sherlock \
        https://pypi.org/project/sherlock-project

Thanks in advance.
